text:

Date: Sat Apr 26 18:13:57 2014

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/188600
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-LinkIntegrity/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-LinkIntegrity/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-LinkIntegrity/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:13:53 2014	(r352329)
+++ head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-LinkIntegrity/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:13:57 2014	(r352330)
@@ -8,9 +8,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Make tamper-resistent links in CGI::Application
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-CGI-Application>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application \
 		p5-URI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI \
 		p5-Digest-HMAC>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Digest-HMAC \
